title: GUIDE FOR THE APPLICATION OF THE MONTESSORI METHOD TO TEACHING 2nd LANGUAGE IN ADULT EDUCATION: Second edition
author: GÜNEY, Medine
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The main objective of the book is to present the ‘Montessori Method in Teaching 2nd Language to Adults". The book is a " GUIDE FOR THE APPLICATION OF THE MONTESSORI METHOD TO TEACHING 2nd LANGUAGE IN ADULT EDUCATION".  

 This new edition contains: 

 PART I: THE MONTESSORI METHOD FOR ADULTS 

 1.       INTRODUCTION – MONTESSORI METHOD FOR ADULTS 

 Who is Maria Montessori? 

 Experiences and Indications for Teachers, Experts and Common 

 2.       THE PRINCIPLES OF THE MMTLA MODEL 

 3.       ABOUT THE PROJECT AND TARGET GROUPS 

 4.       THE EXPECTED RESULTS OF THE PROJECT 

 PART 2: THE PRINCIPLES OF MONTESSORI METHOD FOR ADULTS 

 1.       PRINCIPLE 1: THE ABSORBENT MIND 

 Introduction and the General Principles  

 Technical Characteristics: Related Concepts  

 Montessori Inspired Projects in the Adult Education 

 2.       PRINCIPLE 2: LEARNING ENVIRONMENT 

 Learning Space, One Other 

 Montessori Classroom Organization. The Concept of Mixed Different Ages and Levels  

 Resources 

 Space Management  

 3.       PRINCIPLE 3: EXPERIMENTATION AND EXPLORATION 

 Practical Activities Montessori Inspired To Be Used In The Teaching Of Adults 

 Preparing The Set  

 Activities With Real-Life Situations  

 Activities Meant To Develop Listening and Writing Skills  

 Activities to Develop Fluency, Creativity and Critical Thinking 

 Going Outside the Classroom 

 Using Video and Editing 

 The Role of Music in the Class 

 Conclusion 

 4.       PRINCIPLE 4: OBSERVATION 

 Introduction 

 Developing a Method to Allow the Educator to Follow the Progress of the Adult Learners 

 Seven Steps to Observe the Progress of Adult Learners 

 Creation of a Personal Educational “Calendar” 

 5.       PRINCIPLE 5: INDEPENDENCE 

 Problem-Solving Abilities 

 Create Owns’ Educational Program 

 Creation of a Community of Learners Using Social Media 

 Conclusion 

 PART 3: HOW TO IMPLEMENT 

 1.       TRAINING COURSES 

 Didactic resources/materials 

 Social Media and digital platforms 

 Evaluation Toolkit  

 Questions on the Principles of Montessori Method 

 2.       MONTESSORI METHOD FOR TEACHING 2 ND  -  LESSON TO ADULTS SAMPLE LESSON PLAN 

 Sample Lesson 1 

 Sample Lesson 2 

 3.       MMTLA LOCAL TRAININGS EXPERIENCE 

 MMTLA: THE CASE OF OSMANIYE İL MILLI EĞITIM MÜDÜRLÜĞÜ 

 MMTLA: THE EUROPE FOR ALL CASE 

 MMTLA: THE LUSOFONA UNIVERSITY CASE 

 MMTLA: THE ROMANIAN CASE 

 MMTLA: THE AUSTRIAN CASE 

 MMTLA: THE POLISH CASE
